title: P.O.A.
body:
# The Power of Air

### The Creation of the Power.
The power of air is a mod that makes **air collectors** that when **left in the main hand for long enough** turns into **air buckets**. **Three air buckets plus some expensive material** can turn into a **power**.

## Once the Power is active, three powers are at the disposal of the user.
- The First is a **dagger** that can well **stab pretty well**.
- The Second is the **most powerful**. A tendril that can split the air **summoning lightning upon contact of a entity** dealing **massive damage**.
- The Third is a **prepulsion** that **sends the user up far** and any entity hit up **about one third of the distance**.

### A **passive ability of the Power** makes it so **the user doesn't take fall damage** and another passive is **many effects** given to the user.


<details>
<summary>In a Modpack</summary>

I am **fine** with this **being used in a modpack** as long as credited.

</details>
